ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL of the course syllabus */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "hw1" INTEGER /* Grade for homework assignment 1 */,
  "hw2" INTEGER /* Grade for homework assignment 2 */,
  "hw3" INTEGER /* Grade for homework assignment 3 */,
  "exam1" INTEGER /* Grade for exam 1 */,
  "exam2" INTEGER /* Grade for exam 2 */,
  "final_exam" INTEGER /* Grade for the final exam */,
  "project_grade" INTEGER /* Grade for any projects */,
  "total_grade" INTEGER /* Overall grade for the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grades were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  "final_grade" INTEGER /* Final grade for the course upon completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student providing feedback */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the student
Contact phone number of the student
Year the student enrolled in the university
